nav.logOutConfirmDescription: You'll need to sign back in to access your profile.
nav.logOutError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: welcome back.
login.subtitle: sign in to continue your practice.

signup.title: join pole space.
signup.subtitle: create your account to start tracking.

verifyEmail.sentBody: we sent a verification link to your email. it expires in 24 hours.
verifyEmail.expiredBody: your verification link has expired. enter your email to get a new one.
verifyEmail.sendFailedBody: we failed to deliver your verification email. please try again.
verifyEmail.invalidBody: this verification link is invalid. please sign up again.
verifyEmail.serverBody: we could not verify your email. please try again later.
verifyEmail.spamNote: didn't get an email? check your spam folder

forgotPassword.heading: forgot password.
forgotPassword.body: enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successBody: if that address is registered, a reset link is on its way. it expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.heading: new password.
resetPassword.invalidToken: the password reset link is invalid or has expired.

profile.noProgress: No progress yet. Start tracking moves from the catalog.
profile.noFavourites: No favourites yet. Add moves from the catalog.

notFound.heading: lost your momentum?
notFound.message: this move doesn't exist in our catalog yet, or the link has lost its grip.

unexpected.heading: something went wrong.
unexpected.message: an unexpected error occurred. try refreshing the page.

verification.subject: Verify your email — Pole Space
verification.heading: Verify your email
verification.body: Click the button below to verify your email address.
verification.ignore: If you didn't create a Pole Space account, ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Password reset — Pole Space
passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: Click the button below to reset your password.
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, ignore this email.
